options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: goal
options.description:
What is considered the goal for Pokemon Pinball:
Including multiple options will require all to have been met
Pokédex: a required number of Pokémon are registered within the Pokédex
Score: a certain target score is reached on either the Ruby or Sapphire board (must be registered to the high scores)
Targets: certain specific target Pokémon have been captured

options.name: difficulty
options.description:
Whether logic should apply additional restrictions on locations
Normal: All locations other than catching have additional requirements
Hard: Simple board tasks such as hatching and evolutions have no additional requirements
Expert: Longer board tasks such as 25+ multiplier bumper hits and catching Groudon/Kyogre have no additional requirements
Master: No locations have additional requirements other than what is strictly required

options.name: starting_board
options.description: The first unlocked board

options.name: single_board
options.description: If enabled, only items/locations associated with your starting board will be created.

options.name: pokedex_requirement
options.description: On Pokédex goal, the amount of Pokémon registered required to goal.

options.name: score_requirement
options.description: On Score goal, the required score for goal.

options.name: pokemon_targets
options.description: On Targets goal, what specific Pokémon are required for goal.

options.name: bonus_multiplier_checks
options.description: Number of bonus multiplier hits to include as checks per-board

options.name: ball_upgrade_checks
options.description: Number of ball upgrades to include as checks. This includes both the ball upgrades

options.name: evo_mode
options.description:
Evo Mode Behavior
Arrows: Each arrow of Evo mode is split up and added to the pool.
Full: All arrows are condensed into a single item and added to the pool.
Start With: Start with Evo Mode.

options.name: collect_pokedex
options.description:
Whether server collects should apply to Pokédex locations. This can cause goaling if all goals are tied to
Pokédex locations.

options.name: ringlink
options.description: Links coin gain/loss with other players.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: Spheal Bonus Stage - 5 Poké Ball Hoops

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.
options: Spheal Bonus Stage - 5 Poké Ball Hoops

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.
options: Spheal Bonus Stage - 5 Poké Ball Hoops

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
